member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for the Kafka transport.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.BootstrapServers
member.summary: Comma-separated list of broker addresses. Required.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.Acks
member.summary: Producer acknowledgment level. Default is "all".

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.EnableIdempotence
member.summary: Whether to enable idempotent producer. Default is true.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.CompressionType
member.summary: Compression codec. Default is "lz4".

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.BatchSize
member.summary: Producer batch size in bytes. Default is 131072 (128 KB).

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.LingerMs
member.summary: Batch accumulation delay in milliseconds. Default is 10.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.SessionTimeoutMs
member.summary: Consumer group session timeout in milliseconds. Default is 45000.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.HeartbeatIntervalMs
member.summary: Consumer heartbeat interval in milliseconds. Default is 3000.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.SecurityProtocol
member.summary: Security protocol. Default is "Plaintext".

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration.Validate
member.summary: Validates the configuration and throws if required fields are missing or invalid.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaSubscription
member.summary: Manages a single Kafka subscription with a dedicated consumer loop. Each subscription has its own IConsumer (NOT thread-safe).

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaSubscription.#ctor(Confluent.Kafka.ConsumerConfig,System.String,System.Func{System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},Messaggero.Abstractions.MessageMetadata,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaSubscription.Start(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the consumer loop on a background task.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaTransport
member.summary: Kafka transport implementation using a single thread-safe producer and per-subscription consumers.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaTransport.#ctor(Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaTransport})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the Kafka transport with the message bus.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.ServiceCollectionExtensions.UseKafka(Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder,System.Action{Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration})
member.summary: Configures the message bus to use Kafka as the sole transport (backward compatible). Sets Kafka as the default transport.
member.param: An action to configure the Kafka connection settings.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddKafka(Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder,System.Action{Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers Kafka as a named transport using the default name "Kafka".
member.param: An action to configure the Kafka connection settings.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddKafka(Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Messaggero.Transport.Kafka.KafkaConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers Kafka as a named transport with the specified name.
member.param: The name to register the transport under.
An action to configure the Kafka connection settings.
